basic_details.job_title: Central Railway Presenting Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Central Railway has officially announced the Presenting Officer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates holding a Graduate degree are eligible to submit their offline applications on or before 31 July 2026. The recruitment is being conducted on a deputation basis. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.details: Substantive M/L-7 (7th PC), GP-4600 on regular basis or one level/grade below (not under MACP) Staff upgraded in Level-8 are also eligible to apply Completed 5 (five) years' service (as on date of issuing the notification) Experience in dealing with D&AR cases

selection_process: Viva-voce/APARs/credibility Date of viva-voce will be informed in due course
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31 July 2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31 July 2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central Railway Presenting Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Railway Presenting Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Central Railway Presenting Officer post is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Presenting Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be substantive M/L-7 (7th PC), GP-4600 on a regular basis or one level/grade below (not under MACP). Staff upgraded to Level-8 are also eligible. A minimum of 5 years of service and experience in dealing with D&AR cases is also required.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Presenting Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Presenting Officer in Central Railway.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Presenting Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be offered a salary as per Matrix Level-7 (7th PC), with a Grade Pay of 4600.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it through the proper channel.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for the Presenting Officer post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Presenting Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Viva-voce, APARs, and credibility. The date for the viva-voce will be communicated later.

faq.question: Q8. Can direct applications be submitted?
faq.answer: No, direct applications will not be entertained. Applications must be forwarded through the proper channel.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Central Railway. The link will be provided in the Important Links section of this article.
